vdc 501.4V
current HVP/HVN to ground seondary 
Or to the comminication insulation 
less than 0.1µA (some time multimeter show 0.1uA some time 0.0) 

Resistor more than > 501.4/0.1= 5000Mohm = 5Gohm  


micrometer is tested wih 990kohm and 404V ==> 414µA (expected 408µA) 
micrometer have 100 ohm resistor
